description: Allowed Copilot Chat model names used by APEX agents. Canonical source for model-floor lint. Update this file when model availability changes or models deprecate.

Claude Opus 4.6.notes: Highest-reasoning tier. Reserve for steps with creative or multi-artifact decisions.

Claude Sonnet 4.6.notes: Strong code generation at lower cost than Opus. Prefer for long code outputs.

GPT-5.4.notes: Strong structured output + tool use. Use for validators and deterministic subagents.

GPT-5.3-Codex.notes: Code/maths-focused. Used by cost-estimate-subagent for numerical reasoning.

floors.rationale: A `model_floor` is the minimum capability tier an agent may use. Agents may be pinned above their floor but never below. Floor enforcement catches silent downgrades; ceilings are changed via PR review.
